ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's manager */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., # Pl, 90s, Att) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., passing, shooting, defending) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "is_cumulative" INTEGER /* Indicates if the metric is cumulative over the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_metrics" (
  "team_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team metric */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric for the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the metric was recorded */,
  "game_week" INTEGER /* Specific game week in which the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_metrics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_metrics" (
  "player_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player metric */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric for the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the metric was recorded */,
  "game_week" INTEGER /* Specific game week in which the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee for the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_metrics" (
  "match_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match metric */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric for the match */,
  "half" TEXT /* Indicates which half of the match the metric pertains to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_metrics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric for the team at the given version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string representing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
